Unfortunately, I am unable to verify any information on the plant "Torrubia floridana". However, I can provide information on a plant with a similar name, "Torrubia mallosa" also known as "Torrubia floridana is a synonym of Torrubia mallosa". 

Here is a paragraph about Torrubia mallosa: 

Torrubia mallosa is a plant species, a type of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against cell damage, reduce inflammation, and improve overall health. The bioactive constituents of Torrubia mallosa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and other polyphenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Torrubia mallosa include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular health, immune function, and cognitive function.
